payload.label: microwave
payload.long_description: Front-facing stainless-steel microwave with a rectangular glass door showing interior lights and a right-side digital control panel and buttons; reflective metal finish with slight smudges and mild pixelation in the crop, estimated ~0.8 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"microwave","short_description":"stainless steel countertop microwave front","long_description":"Front-facing stainless-steel microwave with a rectangular glass door showing interior lights and a right-side digital control panel and buttons; reflective metal finish with slight smudges and mild pixelation in the crop, estimated ~0.8 m from the camera.","attributes":["stainless steel finish","rectangular glass door","interior light visible","right-side digital control panel","reflective surface","slight smudges/fingerprints","mildly pixelated/blurred"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
